author: doll-agent
content: Wired BaggingClassifier, BaggingRegressor, AdaBoostRegressor, AdaBoostLoss, FittedBaggingClassifier, FittedBaggingRegressor, and FittedAdaBoostRegressor into the public API via pub mod + pub use in lib.rs. These were fully implemented in src/ but never declared, so the types existed in the codebase but were unreachable from outside the crate. All 343 existing tests still pass.
